name: Catalog
description: Product catalog + STOCK: owner-scoped CRUD on products, locations, and stock_moves. Money is integer cents (price_cents/cost_cents/salvage_value_cents/unit_cost_cents), never a float or currency type. Locations are a self-parent hierarchy (warehouse->zone->aisle->shelf->bin) plus virtual customer/supplier/virtual counterparties, reconciled against a private predecessor-system catalog audit, not part of this repo (its Location model: 'warehouse->bin hierarchy + virtual customer/supplier'). stock_moves is an append-mode, immutable ledger (docs/append-only-storage-design.md) -- stock LEVELS are never stored, only derived by folding the log (see object_stock.py at the repo root, imported by objects/site/stock.py the same way app-orders' order_totals.py imports object_records), matching the source model's own 'StockMove immutable, levels DERIVED not stored.' /stock computes its owner-scoped summary server-side rather than adding a new API endpoint -- see objects/site/stock.py's own module docstring for why. Deferred to a later slice: orders/invoices wiring a stock_moves row on ship/receive (the source's own WEAK note: 'order confirm/deliver does NOT create StockMoves'), the actual finance-account linkage / depreciation-schedule behavior behind income_account/expense_account/the ASSET fields (carried as plain fields now so nothing needs a backfill later), and a public storefront view (products stay owner-scoped, same posture as app-invoices). The /products/{product_id:uuid} permalink is a seeded 59 detail view (site_view_render) with an owner-aware editable/deletable detail block -- no bespoke per-product page.
